# Applied Digital

**Category:** AI Colocation / GPU Hosting Partners  
**Website:** https://applieddigital.com/

## Headline
Operator and campus developer bridging AI hosting, energy-intensive compute, and modular infrastructure pathways.

## Overview
Applied Digital is relevant because it helps connect AI infrastructure demand with a style of campus development shaped by power-heavy compute. It belongs in the market map not just as a hosting option, but as an example of how mining-adjacent and AI-adjacent infrastructure can converge.

## Key capabilities
- compute campus development and operational hosting
- infrastructure pathways that connect AI and energy-intensive workloads
- modular and prefabricated deployment relevance in power-constrained site strategies

## Best fit for
- buyers comparing owned versus operator-led compute campus strategies
- teams interested in how mining-era infrastructure patterns translate to AI capacity
- organizations evaluating regional capacity options outside traditional colocation hubs

## Considerations
Should be compared alongside Crusoe, QTS, CyrusOne, and modular infrastructure vendors so buyers can separate pure hosting value from broader site-and-power strategy value.
